Reduce heat and stir in the remaining stock, one ladle at a time, until the rice is
creamy but still al dente, about 18-20 minutes. The risotto should flow slightly on the plate.
Season with salt and white pepper. Finish with butter and grated Parmigiano-Reggiano.

CARPACCIO DI PESCE SPADA

Slice the swordfish paper-thin. Arrange on chilled plates. Dress with extra virgin olive oil,
lemon juice, and sea salt. Scatter thinly shaved fennel and microgreens. Serve immediately.

Preparation: 10 minutes
Serves: 4

CARPACCIO WITH CITRUS DRESSING

Place thin slices on a cold plate. Whisk together lemon, lime, orange juice with good quality
oil. Season with fıne sea salt and crushed coriander seeds. Garnish with fresh herbs and
thinly sliced radish.

nto a loured work counter and knead until smooth, approx 8 minutes. Proof in oiled bowl, cover
with damp cloth, 45 minutes at room temperature. Shape into ½ dozen rounds. Second proof 30 min.

Place pans in 225°C/435-VI0.. oven for 12-15 minutes until golden brown. Cool on wire rack.

Makes: 1 dozen

FRESH PASTA DOUGH

125 grams plain flour
½ cup plus ı tablespoon water
Pinch of sea salt

Combine flour and slt on work bench. Make well in center. Add water gradually, mixing with fork
until dough comes together. Knead 5 minutes.

Mushroom Risotto

Ingredients:
300g arborio rice
1 liter vegetable stock
250g mixed mushrooms, sliced
1 medium onion, finely diced
100ml dry white wine
50g butter
50g parmesan cheese, grated
2 tablespoons olive oil
Salt and white pepper to taste
Fresh parsley for garnish

Method:
Heat stock in separate pan and keep at gentle simmer. Heat olive oil in large risotto pan over
medium heat. Sauté onion until translucent, about 3 minutes. Add mushrooms and cook until
golden, approximately 5 minutes. Add rice and stir constantly for 2 minutes to toast grains.

Deglaze with white wine and stir until absorbed. Begin adding warm stock one ladle at a time,
stirring frequently. Each addition should be absorbed before adding more stock, taking about
18-20 minutes total. The rice should be creamy yet retain a slight firmness to the bite.

Finish risotto by stirring in butter and grated parmesan cheese. Season with salt and white
pepper to taste. Transfer to serving bowl and garnish with fresh parsley and additional cheese.

Serves: 4-6
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 30 minutes
